# My Property Snagging - Knowledge Base

## Company Overview

**Company Name:** My Property Snagging (MyPropertySnagging. com)
**Tagline:** Top-Rated Property Snagging Company in the UAE
**Description:** MyPropertySnagging. com is a leading, DED-licensed and InterNACHI-certified property snagging company in the UAE, known for delivering accurate, professional, and highly detailed snagging inspections.

With over 60,000 completed inspections and engineers who each hold 12,000+ hours of on-site experience, we ensure every property is thoroughly evaluated to the highest international standards. **Mission:** Your home deserves a flawless start — we make it happen. We find the faults before they become your problems. **Key Stats:**
- 1,200+ snags completed
- 24,000+ defects identified
- AED 1.

3M+ in savings for clients
- 1,200+ happy clients
- 60,000+ completed inspections
- 12,000+ hours of on-site experience per engineer

---

## Services

### 1.

Newly Handed Over Properties Inspection
- **Purpose:** Identify construction defects before the developer's defect liability period ends. - **Why it's critical:** Free rectifications are available within a limited time. - **Service Focus:** Identifying all construction flaws and systems that do not meet local regulations or specifications. - **Key Benefit:** Ensures a smooth, stress-free handover process and protects you from incurring future repair costs. ### 2.

End-of-Defect Liability Period (DLP) Inspection (11-Month Warranty Inspection)
- **Purpose:** Performed near the end of the warranty period to maximize your claim against the developer. - **Service Focus:** Checking for issues that may have developed or become apparent since handover such as settlement cracks and latent defects. - **Key Benefit:** Uses your final opportunity to legally compel the developer to rectify latent defects before the warranty expires. ### 3.

Resale & Pre-Purchase Inspection (Secondary Market Properties)
- **Purpose:** Pre-purchase inspection for an informed investment. - **Service Focus:** Assessing the age, wear, maintenance condition, and operational status of all major systems and structural elements. - **Key Benefit:** Provides crucial negotiation leverage by giving you an accurate picture of expected maintenance costs. ### 4.

Post-Renovation & Contractor Work Inspection
- **Purpose:** Verify renovation quality before final payment or move-in. - **Service Focus:** Checking the workmanship, material quality, and adherence to design specifications for all recent works. - **Key Benefit:** Guarantees that you only sign off on and pay for work that is completed correctly and professionally. ### 5. Rental Properties Inspection
- **Purpose:** Ensure the property is safe, functional, and rentable.

- **Why it's critical:** Prevent complaints and protect rental value. ### 6. Commercial Properties Inspection
- **Purpose:** Verify compliance and usability for retail, office, or warehouse use. - **Why it's critical:** Avoid business disruptions and liabilities.

---

## Scope of Work (What We Inspect)

### Electrical Fittings & Systems
- Switches and sockets alignment
- Light fixtures and installations
- Circuit breaker (DB) panel check
- Load testing and safety compliance

### Painting & Wall Finishes
- Paint uniformity and touch-ups
- Wall cracks, stains, or bubbles
- Plaster finish and straightness
- Skirting and edge detailing

### Air Conditioning (HVAC)
- Cooling performance test
- Thermostat functionality
- Duct and vent cleanliness
- Condensation or leakage checks

### Plumbing & Sanitary Fixtures
- Water pressure and flow
- Drainage speed and leakage
- Faucet and shower fitting alignment
- Hot/cold water mixing valve check

### Doors, Windows & Locks
- Proper opening/closing
- Alignment and sealing
- Handle, hinges, and lock inspection
- Water and air tightness testing

### Glazing & Mirrors
- Scratches, chips, and cracks
- Proper sealing and alignment
- Fogging or condensation issues

### Flooring & Tiling
- Cracks, chips, or uneven surfaces
- Grouting quality and gaps
- Hollow tiles (tapping test)
- Skirting edge finish

### Internet / TV / Telephone Points
- Correct placement and labeling
- Functionality testing where applicable

### External Works (If Applicable)
- Balcony railing safety and finishes
- Waterproofing of terraces
- External paint and facade quality
- Drainage slope and water outlets

### Roof & Terrace
- Roof conditions and leakage inspection
- Structural damages or cracks
- External situation of solar panel, HVAC etc.

### MEP Systems (Mechanical, Electrical, Plumbing)
- Full functionality check of electrical sockets, switches, and load testing
- Safety and alignment of the Distribution Board (DB)
- Water pressure and drainage speed in all sanitary fixtures
- Hot/cold water flow and mixing valves
- Boiler flue inspection and correct earthing arrangements

### Structure & Level Tolerances
- Verification of wall, ceiling, and floor levels using laser alignment tools
- Detection of structural and non-structural cracks or settlement issues
- Checking for squareness and compliance with tolerances

### Kitchens & Bathrooms
- Inspection of worktops, surfaces, and cupboard alignments
- Checking sanitary-ware, screens, and shower enclosures for proper sealing
- Testing built-in appliances and storage units

---

## Advanced Tools & Technology

### 1.

Thermal Imaging (Infrared) Cameras
- Detects temperature variations across surfaces (non-destructive testing)
- Reveals hidden moisture and leaks behind walls
- Identifies missing/damaged insulation and energy loss
- Detects electrical hotspots, overloaded circuits, and fire risks
- Critical for waterproofing inspection

### 2.

Digital Moisture Meters
- Measures percentage of water content within building materials
- Both pin-type and non-invasive scanning meters
- Confirms and quantifies severity of moisture detected by thermal camera
- Provides quantitative proof for snagging reports

### 3.

High-Precision Laser Measuring Tools
- Checks if walls are plumb (perfectly vertical), floors are level
- Verifies room sizes, ceiling heights match developer floor plans
- Measures alignment and tolerance with engineering precision

### 4. Anemometers & HVAC Performance Testers
- Measures velocity and volume of air flow from HVAC vents
- Tests air supply rate to ensure correct cooling capacity
- Checks suction power of exhaust fans in kitchens/bathrooms

### 5.

Inspection Cameras (Borescopes & Drones)
- Drones for aerial inspection of high-rise facades, roofs, and compounds
- Borescopes (snake cameras) for wall cavities, AC ducts, and plumbing voids
- Ensures 100% inspection coverage

### 6.

Spectora Software
- Industry-leading inspection reporting software
- Generates precise, visual, photo-supported reports
- Modern solution built for performance, trust, and usability
- From inspection to report delivery

---

## Snagging Process (4 Easy Steps)

### Step 1: Book Your Inspection
- Schedule online at mypropertysnagging.

com or via phone/WhatsApp
- Online booking available 24/7
- Flexible scheduling options
- Instant confirmation

### Step 2: Comprehensive Inspection
- InterNACHI-certified inspectors perform detailed property inspection
- Advanced tools and equipment used
- Systematic inspection approach
- Photo documentation of all findings
- Inspection takes 1-4 hours depending on property size and type

### Step 3: Receive Detailed Report
- Photo-supported, severity-graded snagging report
- Typically delivered within 12 hours (one of the fastest in UAE)
- Developer-ready format
- Severity grading: Critical, Moderate, Minor

### Step 4: Inspection Briefing
- Report submission to developer
- Guidance on next steps and handover process
- Follow-up support available
- Re-inspection services if needed

---

## Why Choose My Property Snagging

### Certified and Experienced
- DED-licensed company
- InterNACHI-certified inspectors
- Over 10 years of experience
- Detect everything from minor cosmetic flaws to major hidden structural issues

### Use of Specialized Tools and Software
- Thermal cameras, moisture meters, laser alignment tools
- Industry-grade Spectora software for precise visual reports

### Comprehensive Snagging Report
- Detailed, photo-supported, severity-graded report
- Ready to be submitted directly to the developer
- High-resolution, annotated photographs
- Actionable recommendations for each issue

### Saves Time & Effort
- Team handles inspections, documentation, and coordination with contractors
- Fast 12-hour report turnaround time

### Unbiased & Independent Evaluation
- Work solely in client's best interest
- Completely independent and honest property assessment

### Adds Long-Term Value
- Prevents costly future repairs
- Increases property's long-term value and appeal

## Common Defects Found During Snagging

### MEP Issues
- Faulty wiring
- Loose sockets
- Water leaks
- Low pressure
- Drainage problems

### HVAC Defects
- Poor cooling
- Blocked ducts
- Moisture leakage
- Mold growth

### Structural & Finishing Issues
- Cracks in walls
- Hollow tiles
- Misaligned doors/windows
- Poor waterproofing

### Climate-Related Defects (UAE-Specific)
- Dampness
- Mold
- Insulation failures

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is property snagging and why do I need it.

**
A: Property snagging is a detailed inspection of a newly handed-over or existing property to identify defects, incomplete works, or safety issues. It helps you get defects fixed by the developer or contractor before they become costly problems. **Q: How long does an inspection take. **
A: Typical inspections take between 1-4 hours depending on the property size and type. We provide a clear estimate during booking. **Q: Will I receive a report after the inspection.

**
A: Yes — clients receive a photo-supported, severity-graded snagging report suitable for submission to developers and contractors. Reports are typically delivered within 12 hours. **Q: Do you cover all emirates in the UAE. **
A: Yes — we operate across Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Ras Al Khaimah, and other UAE emirates. Contact us to confirm availability in your area. **Q: How do I book an inspection. **
A: You can book online using our booking form at mypropertysnagging.

com/booking, call us at +971 55 412 1205, or use WhatsApp. **Q: What property types do you inspect. **
A: We inspect villas/townhouses, apartments, and commercial properties including retail, office, and warehouse spaces. **Q: What is a Defect Liability Period (DLP). **
A: Most new properties come with a standard Defect Liability Period (warranty). Our 11-month warranty inspection is performed near the end of this period to maximize your claim against the developer before the warranty expires.

**Q: How much does snagging cost. **
A: Pricing depends on the property type and size. Contact us for an instant quote via our website, WhatsApp, or phone. Provide your property type (Villa/Townhouse, Apartment, or Commercial), built-up size, number of bedrooms, and project name for an accurate quote.

---

## Partnership Programs

### For Real Estate Agents
- Partner with My Property Snagging to offer inspection services to your clients
- Add value to your real estate services

### For Developers
- Work with My Property Snagging for quality assurance
- Pre-handover inspections to ensure defect-free delivery

2. Project name
3. Property type: Villa/Townhouse, Apartment, or Commercial
4. Built-up size (in sq. ft)
5.

Number of bedrooms: Studio, 1 BR, 2 BR, 3 BR, 4 BR, 5 BR, or 6 BR+

**Book online:** https://mypropertysnagging. com/booking
**Get instant quote:** https://mypropertysnagging. com/get-instant-quote
**WhatsApp:** https://wa. me/971554121205
**Phone:** +971 55 412 1205

**Norah (Marina, Dubai):** "Excellent snagging service. They caught issues I wouldn't have noticed. Highly professional and detailed. "

It helped us get our developer to fix many issues before handover. "

**Eldo R (Furjan, Dubai):** "Professional, responsive, and thorough. Their snagging report saved me from expensive repairs later. ".
